# pfsense_firewall_nat_1to1 (Data Source)

[Firewall NAT 1:1](https://docs.netgate.com/pfsense/en/latest/nat/1-to-1-nat.html) data source. Retrieve details of an existing 1:1 NAT rule by description.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `description` (String) Description of the 1:1 NAT rule to retrieve.

### Read-Only

- `destination_address` (String) Destination address for the rule.
- `destination_not` (Boolean) Whether the destination address match is inverted.
- `disabled` (Boolean) Whether this 1:1 NAT rule is disabled.
- `external` (String) External IP address for the 1:1 NAT rule.
- `interface` (String) Network interface this NAT rule applies to.
- `ipprotocol` (String) IP address family (inet, inet6, or inet46).
- `nat_reflection` (String) NAT reflection mode for this rule.
- `no_binat` (Boolean) Whether 1:1 NAT (BINAT) is disabled for this rule.
- `source_address` (String) Source address for the rule.
- `source_not` (Boolean) Whether the source address match is inverted.
